mapper.select:
SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, REQ_IDX,REQ_NAME, PHONE,CELL_PHONE, APPLY_ID,LOCKER_IDX,ADD_DATE,ADD_ID,MOD_DATE,MOD_ID,DELETE_YN, LOCKER_PRE_IDX,MEMBER_KEY, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BLACKLIST A WHERE A.HOMEPAGE_ID = LOCKER_REQ.HOMEPAGE_ID AND A.MEMBER_ID = LOCKER_REQ.APPLY_ID AND A.DELETE_YN = 'N') AS BLACK_COUNT FROM LOCKER_REQ WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND LOCKER_PRE_IDX = #{locker_pre_idx} AND LOCKER_IDX is null
AND req_name LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
ORDER BY REQ_IDX

SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, REQ_IDX,REQ_NAME, PHONE,CELL_PHONE, APPLY_ID,LOCKER_IDX,ADD_DATE,ADD_ID,MOD_DATE,MOD_ID,DELETE_YN, LOCKER_PRE_IDX, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BLACKLIST A WHERE A.HOMEPAGE_ID = LOCKER_REQ.HOMEPAGE_ID AND A.MEMBER_ID = LOCKER_REQ.APPLY_ID AND A.DELETE_YN = 'N') AS BLACK_COUNT, MEMBER_KEY, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BLACKLIST WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = LOCKER_REQ.HOMEPAGE_ID AND MEMBER_KEY = LOCKER_REQ.MEMBER_KEY AND INSTR(BLACK_TYPE, '20') != 0) as isBlackList FROM LOCKER_REQ WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND LOCKER_PRE_IDX = #{locker_pre_idx}
AND req_name LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
AND locker_idx is not null
AND locker_idx is null
ORDER BY LOCKER_IDX

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LOCKER_REQ WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND LOCKER_PRE_IDX = #{locker_pre_idx}
AND req_name LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
AND locker_idx is not null
AND locker_idx is null
ORDER BY REQ_IDX

SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, REQ_IDX,REQ_NAME, PHONE,CELL_PHONE, APPLY_ID,LOCKER_IDX,ADD_DATE,ADD_ID,MOD_DATE,MOD_ID,DELETE_YN, LOCKER_PRE_IDX, MEMBER_KEY FROM LOCKER_REQ WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND REQ_IDX = #{req_idx} AND LOCKER_PRE_IDX = #{locker_pre_idx}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BLACKLIST WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND MEMBER_KEY = #{member_key}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LOCKER_REQ WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND LOCKER_PRE_IDX = #{locker_pre_idx} AND MEMBER_KEY = #{member_key} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
mapper.update:
UPDATE LOCKER_REQ SET LOCKER_IDX = #{locker_idx}, REQ_IDX = #{req_idx}, REQ_NAME = #{req_name},
PHONE = #{phone},
CELL_PHONE = #{cell_phone},
APPLY_ID = #{apply_id}, MOD_ID = #{mod_id}, LOCKER_PRE_IDX = #{locker_pre_idx}, MOD_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND REQ_IDX = #{req_idx} AND LOCKER_PRE_IDX = #{locker_pre_idx}
UPDATE LOCKER SET STATUS = 2, MOD_ID = #{mod_id}, MOD_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND LOCKER_IDX = #{locker_idx} AND LOCKER_PRE_IDX = #{locker_pre_idx} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
UPDATE LOCKER SET STATUS = 1 WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND LOCKER_PRE_IDX = #{locker_pre_idx} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
UPDATE LOCKER_REQ SET LOCKER_IDX = NULL WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND LOCKER_PRE_IDX = #{locker_pre_idx} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
UPDATE LOCKER_REQ SET LOCKER_IDX = null WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND LOCKER_PRE_IDX = #{locker_pre_idx} AND LOCKER_IDX = #{locker_idx}
mapper.delete: UPDATE LOCKER_REQ SET DELETE_YN = 'Y' WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND REQ_IDX = #{req_idx} AND LOCKER_PRE_IDX = #{locker_pre_idx}
mapper.update: UPDATE LOCKER_REQ SET req_name = '-', phone = NULL, cell_phone = NULL, apply_id = '-', add_id = NULL, mod_id = NULL, member_key = NULL WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND locker_pre_idx = #{locker_pre_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT a.HOMEPAGE_ID, a.REQ_IDX, TO_CHAR(a.ADD_DATE,'yyyy-mm-dd') as ADD_DATE, a.DELETE_YN ,b.LOCKER_IDX, b.LOCKER_NAME, c.START_DATE, c.END_DATE, c.LOCKER_PRE_TYPE FROM LOCKER_REQ a, LOCKER b, LOCKER_PRE c WHERE a.homepage_id = b.homepage_id(+) AND a.locker_pre_idx = b.locker_pre_idx(+) AND a.locker_idx = b.locker_idx(+) AND a.homepage_id = c.homepage_id(+) AND a.locker_pre_idx = c.locker_pre_idx(+) AND a.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND a.MEMBER_KEY = #{member_key} ORDER BY a.ADD_DATE DESC
